Premium template · Ship in hours, not weeks

Launch your AI SaaS
with a premium landing page.

Premium Next.js SaaS Landing Template. Next.js, Tailwind, and antigravity animations — ready to rebrand, deploy, or resell to your clients.

TypeScript

Next.js 15 App Router

60 FPS

CSS animations

Fully responsive

Breakpoints

6+

Sections included

Engineered for High Performance

Built for template buyers and agencies — modular sections, premium dark UI, and copy you can rebrand in minutes.

Production-Ready Next.js Build

Zero configuration required. Native App Router optimization, strict TypeScript types, and seamless environment setups ready to deploy to Vercel in one click.

60 FPS Animations

Hardware-accelerated CSS keyframes that keep browser rendering lightning fast without lag.

Clean Architecture

Highly scalable file structures ensuring your clients can easily customize sections within seconds.

Tailwind CSS & Lucide Icons

Fully responsive layouts utilizing semantic utility classes. Clean typography hierarchies matched perfectly with dynamic SVG iconography.

What you get

Everything buyers expect

A complete landing page template — not a mock SaaS backend. Rebrand, set your price, and sell or deploy for clients.

Clean source code

Modular React components, typed with TypeScript, and organized for fast rebranding.

Dark premium UI

Purple–cyan gradient system, glass cards, and antigravity motion effects out of the box.

Ready to ship

Hero, features, pricing, FAQ, and footer — everything a SaaS landing needs on day one.

One-click deploy

Optimized for Vercel. Run npm run build and publish your demo or client site in minutes.

License pricing

One-time purchase. Yours forever.

Set your own resale price on Gumroad, Lemon Squeezy, or your site — these are suggested tiers for your listing.

PERSONAL

Personal

One project for your own startup, portfolio, or side product.

$49 once
  • Full source code download
  • All sections & animations
  • Lifetime updates (v1.x)
  • Personal / non-commercial sites
  • Documentation included
Get Personal

COMMERCIAL

Commercial

Best for freelancers and agencies shipping client landing pages.

$99 once
  • Everything in Personal
  • Unlimited client projects
  • White-label — no attribution
  • Priority email support
  • Figma-style customization guide
Get Commercial
AGENCY

Agency

For teams reselling the template or bundling it in productized services.

$199 once
  • Everything in Commercial
  • Resell as part of your offering
